segments.original_text: さあサイマグネットで対空時間をコントロールしながら

segments.text: From that range, that's back throw KO range
segments.original_text: 射程からこれは後ろ投げ撃墜帯でしょう

full_text: Now controlling that air matchup... From that range, that's back throw KO range
